data.name: Lonely Christmas: Succubus Santa
data.detailed_description:
On the North Pole, there's a secret civilization of Santa's helpers that produce presents for humans around the world. The overseer, Ms. Clause notices that your productivity has dropped recently and decides to punish you in her own cruel, sensual, sadistic way. Will your heart be able to endure her sensual methods?

  • Full nudity H-Scenes

  • 4K+ words

  • Censored & uncensored mode

  • 14 unique NSFW images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

  • Kinetic Novel

  • Roughly 15-25 minutes playtime depending on reading speed

data.short_description: On the North Pole, there's a secret civilization of Santa's helpers that produce presents for humans around the world. The overseer, Ms. Clause notices that your productivity has dropped recently and decides to punish you in her own cruel, sensual, sadistic way
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
